events.name: Patio Hangout with Friends
events.description: A casual and enjoyable outing with friends, spending time together on a sunny patio at a pub or restaurant. We were gathered around a long wooden table, enjoying drinks and engaged in lively conversation. The atmosphere was relaxed and cheerful, with other patrons visible around us, and a 'Triple Chimay' sign confirming the pub setting. During the outing, I also took a moment to capture an interesting architectural detail: a unique triangular window set into a rustic brick wall, adding a touch of visual interest to the day.

events.name: American and Texas Flags
events.description: I took a moment to capture the iconic sight of the American flag flying alongside the Texas state flag. They were both unfurled against an overcast sky, creating a simple yet powerful display of national and state pride.

events.name: Dramatic Cloudscape
events.description: I captured a striking series of images focusing on the dramatic and moody skies, featuring heavy clouds, breaks of light, and distant city lights. It was an atmospheric evening worth remembering.

events.name: Concert Night
events.description: I attended a lively concert, capturing the dynamic stage setup with its impressive lighting design and the band performing amidst dramatic beams of light. The atmosphere was electric, with a large crowd enjoying the live music.

events.name: Waterfront View
events.description: I captured a serene waterfront scene from a house, showcasing a picnic table overlooking a large body of water with a distant city skyline under a bright, cloudy sky. It was a peaceful and expansive view.

events.name: Evening Ambiance
events.description: I captured a cozy, intimate moment focusing on a single candle burning inside a clear glass bottle, creating warm red and orange light against a dark background, which set a serene mood. Later, I also noticed and photographed the unique lighting design in the same venue, featuring numerous bare bulbs hanging at various lengths from the ceiling, connected by a network of wires. This created a modern, industrial-chic, and artistic atmosphere, complementing the distinct ambiance of the evening.

events.name: Youth Football Day
events.description: I captured a cheerful moment of a young boy during what appears to be a sports day. He's smiling brightly, wearing his i9 Sport jersey and holding a football, set against a backdrop of green and dry foliage, suggesting an outdoor field or park environment, full of the joy of outdoor activity.

events.name: Observing a Distant Smoke Plume
events.description: I captured a striking image of a large, hazy smoke plume rising into the sky, visible from a residential area. The scene includes a poolside with lounge chairs and a young boy in the foreground, creating a stark contrast between the calm setting and the dramatic distant event.

events.name: Vibrant Horizon
events.description: I captured a stunning sunset or sunrise, featuring a dramatic gradient of colors across the sky, from pale yellow to deep orange and red. The sun appears as a bright orb on the horizon, silhouetting the foreground and emphasizing the beauty of the vast sky.

events.name: Clock Tower View
events.description: I captured an impressive clock tower from a low-angle perspective, emphasizing its height and architectural details against a bright, clear sky. The image highlights the building's solid structure, the visible clock faces, and intricate facade, giving a sense of urban grandeur and timelessness.

events.name: Dramatic Street Sunset
events.description: I captured a striking street scene with the sun low in the sky, creating a powerful backlighting effect. The image features a prominent red traffic light and silhouetted buildings, trees, and cars, giving an ordinary urban landscape a dramatic, almost cinematic quality due to the intense light.

events.name: Tilt-Shift City Scene
events.description: I captured a dynamic and unique view of a city street from an elevated perspective during the daytime. The photograph uses a tilt-shift effect, making the busy road, numerous cars, and surrounding urban environment appear like a miniature model, highlighting the flow of traffic and architectural details from a fresh viewpoint.

events.name: Vibrant Dance Art
events.description: I captured an intriguing and colorful piece of art or a decorative panel featuring the silhouettes of a dancing couple. The background glowed with warm orange and yellow hues, complemented by scattered red stars and clear male and female gender symbols, giving the piece a dynamic and retro-pop aesthetic.

events.name: Garden Harvest
events.description: I captured the satisfaction of harvesting fresh produce, specifically two vibrant red tomatoes, held in my hand on a sunny day with green grass and foliage in the background.

events.name: Birthday Celebration
events.description: I captured a birthday celebration featuring my older daughter preparing to blow out the candles on her colorful Spongebob Squarepants cake, with her younger sister watching from the kitchen counter.

events.name: Fresh Produce Prep
events.description: I captured fresh, vibrant produce, including ripe red tomatoes and a striped root vegetable with its greens, laid out on a wooden cutting board, highlighting the beauty of freshly sourced ingredients ready for meal preparation.

events.name: Tropical Flower Beauty
events.description: I captured the stunning Bird of Paradise flower, admiring its vibrant orange and blue petals and unique, bird-like shape, appreciating this beautiful tropical bloom.

events.name: My Garden Delights
events.description: I continued to capture the beauty and bounty of my garden, showcasing vibrant red and purple climbing flowers flourishing on trellises next to a stone wall, close-ups of my growing tomatoes (both ripe and green), and the delicate charm of a light pink flower with a yellow center. It was a joyful time appreciating the progress and unique details of my various plants thriving in the sunlight.

My explorations on May 25th captured the energy of a city street with yellow taxis and the intimate detail of an incandescent light bulb. On May 27th, I documented affectionate moments between a woman and child, and the vibrant beauty of a blooming sunflower. It showcases a fascinating contrast between this historical structure and the modern skyscrapers in the background, reflecting my interest in the unique character of cityscapes and the interplay between different architectural eras.

photos.captionKii: I captured this vibrant mural that greets visitors with 'Welcome To ROUND ROCK TEXAS', prominently featuring images related to the city and a clear mention of 'Dell Diamond' within the design. It's a colorful and inviting piece of art, perfectly capturing the spirit of the place. In front of the mural, there are three large wooden spools stacked up, and a golf cart is parked nearby. This shot really helps round out the experience of visiting Dell Diamond, showing some of the unique details and welcomes around the stadium.

photos.caption: 2014-03-29 15.44.51 — SONY DSC
photos.captionKii: I captured this lovely family photo of us inside Dell Diamond. My wife, our two children, and another relative or friend are all smiling brightly in front of the large windows that overlook the baseball field. It was great to be there with everyone, enjoying the atmosphere, and taking in the view of the stadium from inside. You can even catch a glimpse of the stands and the green field out beyond us, making it clear we were right in the heart of the action.

photos.caption: Beautiful. Thank you @angelicadevere & @PMabray!
photos.captionKii: I captured this beautiful, vibrant bouquet of tulips, showcasing a delightful mix of colors. There are rich purples, bright fuchsias, warm oranges, and classic reds, all with a few crisp white ones peeking through. Each bloom looks fresh and tightly furled, hinting at the full splendor they'll reach, and their vibrant green stems provide a lovely contrast. It feels like such a cheerful and welcoming sight, a perfect splash of color to brighten the day.

photos.caption: The city at dawn.
photos.captionKii: I captured this expansive black and white view of a city, looking down from a high vantage point. In the foreground, there's a really interesting building with distinctive architectural details, like its pointed gables and arched windows, contrasting nicely with the more modern structures beyond. A long street stretches into the distance, flanked by a dense array of buildings, creating a classic urban landscape. The sky above was quite dramatic, a heavy blanket of clouds, which added a certain moodiness to the scene. It was a striking perspective on the bustling city below.

photos.caption: We've been doing different ethnic themes w/ our family + @heatherjstrout & my bro-in-law. Tonight was Italian. He made this.
photos.captionKii: I put together this multi-panel shot to highlight a truly delightful spread of appetizers, likely from a lunch or dinner gathering. Fresh green beans complete that side, adding a touch of green. The other platter features a generous portion of cubed cheese, perfect for snacking, accompanied by plenty of toasted baguette slices and a small bowl of olive oil for dipping. It was such a visually appea

photos.caption: Good day! Red Sox win and are now 2-1. cc @ben_strout
photos.captionKii: I created this multi-panel photo to capture the energy of a youth baseball game. photos.caption: Beautiful day at the beach!
photos.captionKii: I took this shot looking out over the expansive ocean, capturing the powerful waves as they crashed towards the shore, creating foamy white lines. The sky above was dramatic, with a band of dark, heavy clouds stretching across, contrasting with some patches of brighter sky higher up. The light reflecting off the water had a beautiful, almost moody quality to it, hinting at the ever-changing nature of the coast. Even with the clouds, it felt incredibly serene and vast, perfectly encapsulating another moment from my time by the sea.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweet moment of a young girl standing on a robust stone jetty, all wrapped up in a towel. She's looking right at the camera with a gentle smile, and her hair is playfully tousled by what must have been a light breeze. In the background, the sandy beach stretches out with distant dunes, and the vast ocean meets the clear sky, creating a beautiful coastal backdrop. This black and white shot really brings out the textures of the rocks and her soft towel, reminding me of the simple joys of a day by the sea.

photos.caption: A day at the beach! bcc @kyleflaherty
photos.captionKii: I captured the expansive beauty of the sand dunes on what was a perfectly clear and sunny day. The wind had sculpted intricate patterns into the sand, and two weathered wooden posts stood out in the foreground, creating a nice sense of depth. In the distance, I could make out some structures that looked like picnic tables, hinting at a place where people could relax and enjoy the coastal views. It was peaceful to just take in the vastness of the landscape and the clear blue sky, a perfect continuation of my beach adventures.

photos.caption: Race! #SouthPadre
photos.captionKii: I captured this lively moment of four people running joyfully across the sandy beach, their backs to me, heading towards the expansive dunes in the distance. The sun is bright, and the clear blue sky makes for a perfect day out. It looks like they're really enjoying the freedom and open space of the beach, kicking up a bit of sand as they go. It was a great feeling to see so much energy and happiness in this beautiful coastal setting.

photos.caption: Black headed gull #nofilter
photos.captionKii: I captured this beautiful moment of a seagull gracefully taking flight over the water's edge. Its wings are spread wide, and its shadow stretches out on the wet sand below, creating a lovely reflection. The gentle waves are just reaching the shore, adding to the serene atmosphere of the beach. It was so peaceful to watch the bird, and I felt lucky to catch it in mid-air.

photos.caption: Lunch with my beautiful family.

We're sitting inside what looks like a cozy restaurant or dining area, with large windows in the background letting in some natural light, and other people in the distance. The atmosphere felt very relaxed and happy, perfect for

photos.caption: At @thelbma's RetailLoco event. Looking forward to my panel.
photos.captionKii: I captured this stunning view looking out from what appears to be a modern building, with its grid-like window frames creating a cool architectural perspective. In the distance, the grand dome of what looks like a state capitol building stands out, surrounded by other city architecture. I remember being impressed by how much of the city stretched out before me from this vantage point. It felt like a quintessential city experience, appreciating the urban landscape from above.

photos.caption: Mr. @chimoose @weissword and @aaronstrout at #w2ogeek

photos.caption: Spring is springing. #whyaustin
photos.captionKii: I took this photo on a rather grey day, but the blossoming trees lining the street really brought a sense of quiet beauty. All the trees are covered in delicate white flowers, which almost makes it look like it's lightly snowing, even though it's clearly spring. The road curves gently into the distance, flanked by a stone wall on one side and a landscaped median with more of these lovely flowering trees. It felt so peaceful to be out, despite the overcast sky, and I just had to capture this moment of early spring bloom.

photos.caption: And now we are ready for #SXSW!
photos.captionKii: I captured this shot of a modern-looking building under a beautiful clear blue sky. A large blue banner across the facade prominently displays 'W2O GROUP,' along with other names like 'WCG,' 'twst,' 'BrevLife,' and 'wodWorks.' Just below the banner, I noticed the address '3000' in a distinct yellow. There's a concrete ramp with a black railing leading up to the entrance area, and some dry grass in the foreground, giving the whole scene a clean, professional feel. It makes me wonder if I was visiting this office or just passing by.

photos.caption: Sky high!
photos.captionKii: I captured this energetic shot of a child mid-air on the trampoline in our backyard! Their arms are spread wide and hair is flying, perfectly conveying the sheer joy and freedom of the moment. You can see the house in the background with its pillars, and the bare trees against a cloudy sky, which gives the scene a cool, dramatic feel in this sepia-toned photo. It was a really fun moment of playtime.

photos.caption: Brooklyn Bridge at sunrise.
photos.captionKii: I was completely mesmerized by this incredible sunset over the water, with what looks like the iconic Brooklyn Bridge beautifully silhouetted against the vibrant sky. The colors were just stunning – a soft blue fading into dramatic dark clouds at the top, then bursting into fiery oranges and reds along the horizon. You can see the city lights just starting to twinkle on the bridge and in the distance, and the reflections on the water were so peaceful. I definitely had to capture this breathtaking view.

photos.caption: Lunch here with my lady friend.
photos.captionKii: I really loved the look of this classic neon sign for 'Clark's Oyster Bar.' The 'Clark's' part is glowing in such a striking green neon, with 'OYSTER BAR' illuminated below it in a warm, inviting yellow. I think it has such a cool, retro vibe, and it definitely made me excited to check out what was inside. It's one of those signs that just captures your attention with its unique style, set against the brick buildings in the background.

photos.caption: #cloudporn
photos.captionKii: I captured this truly breathtaking view of the sky, painted with such vibrant and rich colors. At the very top, there's a deep, serene blue, which gradually transitions into layers of dark, moody clouds that are dramatically streaked with brilliant pinks and fiery reds. Towards the horizon, the scene glows with warm yellows and oranges, creating an almost magical gradient. It was one of those moments where the sky just puts on an incredible show, and I felt compelled to capture its beauty.

photos.caption: Zen
photos.captionKii: I caught this incredibly sweet moment of my cat completely curled up and fast asleep. Their brown and white tabby fur looks so soft as they've tucked their head into their paws, almost like they're trying to block out the world for a perfect nap. They're resting comfortably on what looks like a fuzzy, light green or yellowish-green blanket or cushion, which makes the whole scene feel extra cozy and peaceful. It's moments like these that just melt my heart.

photos.caption: Cloud art cc @bpearson62
photos.captionKii: I was struck by the incredible drama in the sky when I captured this photo. The sun is powerfully breaking through a thick band of dark, ominous clouds, creating a brilliant, almost ethereal glow. The overall sky has this mesmerizing blue-green tint, which really emphasizes the contrast with the bright light. Below the cloud line, I can see the silhouettes of several trees, and further down, the faint outline of a building, adding a sense of scale to this stunning natural display.

photos.caption: My handsome feller at Cotillion.

photos.caption: Brooklyn Bridge

photos.caption: My first time in our NYC offices.

In the foreground, a collection of beautiful, tall-masted sailing ships are docked at a snowy pier, their rigging reaching towards the cloudy sky. Beyond them, the expansive river or bay leads to a dense urban skyline, with countless buildings rising up in the distance. There's even a hint of snow on the ground along the waterfront, adding to the wintery atmosphere. I love the contrast between the historic vessels and the modern city, making for a truly dynamic scene.

photos.caption: Geese-ish
photos.captionKii: I snapped this shot of two geese enjoying the bright sunlight on a paved path. One goose has its head stretched way up, looking at something in the sky or just observing its surroundings, while the other is looking down, perhaps grooming itself or searching for food. Their long shadows stretch out behind them, really highlighting the intensity of the morning or afternoon sun. It was a lovely, peaceful moment to capture.

photos.caption: It looks so much bigger in the movies.

It's quite striking with its torch held high and the tablet in its left hand, clearly showing 'JULY IV MDCCLXXVI', marking the date of American Independence. The setting looks like a city park or public square, with some bare tree branches on the left suggesting it might be winter, and modern buildings visible in the background against a bright, clear sky. I really liked the strong contrast and classic feel the black and white filter gave to this iconic symbol.

photos.caption: Salt Lick time with my bro, sis, @melaniestrout and our famblies
photos.captionKii: I captured this heartwarming shot of a man and two boys, who I believe are his children, all smiling broadly in a rustic outdoor setting. They look so happy together! The adult man has his arm around the older boy, and they're standing in front of a wooden fence. In the background, there's a charming stone building with a metal roof, and some bare trees, suggesting a cool January day. It feels like a wonderful family moment, perhaps during an outing or a visit to a lodge or country park. I love seeing such genuine smiles.

photos.caption: Really?!? Hooters has it's own hotel? How the hell did that happen?!?
photos.captionKii: I captured this image of the Hooters hotel building, with its distinctive red neon signs glowing against the deep blue, almost twilight sky. The palm trees in the foreground hint at a warmer climate, adding to the urban, evening vibe. It's quite a prominent landmark, and I liked the cool, filtered aesthetic of the shot, giving it a somewhat retro feel.

photos.caption: .@piers_fawkes and @feraldata kicking off a talk about the future of #wearabletech

photos.caption: Happy New Year friends, family and co-workers!
photos.captionKii: I captured this striking image of a Celtic cross silhouetted against a beautiful, clear blue sky. The sunlight, perhaps from the early morning or late afternoon, casts the monument in a dark, majestic outline, making its intricate circular design stand out. In the lower left, you can just see the dark shapes of trees, adding to the serene and somewhat somber atmosphere. It feels like a moment of quiet reflection, perhaps fitting for the start of a new year. I love how the simplicity of the silhouette against the expansive sky creates a powerful sense of peace and contemplation.

photos.caption: Primordial.

You can see the logs burning steadily in the rustic metal fire pit. It creates such a comforting and inviting atmosphere, perfect for relaxing and unwinding after a busy holiday period. This kind of warmth and light always brings people together, and it was just what we needed.

photos.caption: Just ran 10 miles with my Daddio. Sub 9 minute pace. #winning #runhappy
photos.captionKii: I love this cheerful photo of me and a good friend enjoying a bright, sunny day together. We're both beaming, and it feels like such a genuine, happy moment. The background shows some green foliage and a hint of a fence, suggesting we were outdoors, perhaps enjoying a walk or just catching up. photos.caption: My chickens hanging with Foghorn Leghorn.

photos.caption: My oldest, @oliviagstrout, and my bro-in-law, @LeeBaker, jammin'.

photos.caption: Sooo cute! A calendar from our youngest. Who doesn't love penguins?!?

photos.caption: Snow down in Austin.

photos.caption: After a 72 hour whirlwind trip from AUS >> BOS >> NYC >> SFO >> AUS I am happy to be back home for the holidays. #ItsFriday

photos.caption: Rocks

photos.caption: My sweetie and me.

It was just one of those moments where the light transforms an everyday architectural detail into something really captivating, and I wanted to remember that.

photos.caption: #whyAustin
photos.captionKii: What an absolutely stunning panoramic view! I remember standing high up, looking out over this beautiful river as it wound its way through the landscape. The homes nestled along the banks, with their warm, reddish-orange roofs, really stood out against the lush trees that were just starting to show hints of autumn colors. The water had these cool ripples, and I could even spot a tiny boat in the distance. Above, the sky was a brilliant blue with soft, wispy clouds, making for a truly picturesque day. This kind of expansive natural beauty always makes me feel so appreciative.

photos.caption: #pieporn

photos.caption: Post-run, pre-Thanksgiving, almost-done-with-Movember selfie.
photos.captionKii: I took a casual selfie on what looks like a really bright and sunny day! I'm wearing my favorite black sunglasses, which have a cool reflection of the road or sidewalk in them, and a comfortable light gray hoodie. My hair is a bit spiky, and I have my mustache and goatee. Behind me, there's lush green foliage, like bushes and a tree, along with a black fence, all under a clear blue sky. It was just one of those nice, simple moments enjoying the good weather outdoors.

photos.caption: Audrey (my six year old) says "Happy Thanks Giveing"
photos.captionKii: I absolutely loved seeing this charming handmade Thanksgiving craft! It looks like a classic handprint turkey, with a brown handprint forming the body and bright, colorful finger paint prints for the feathers – I can clearly see green, blue, orange, and yellow. The little red legs and wattle add such a cute touch. Below the turkey, 'HAPPY THANKS GIVING' is written in sweet, childlike handwriting on the light-colored fabric, which might be a napkin or a small tablecloth. This piece brought such a warm, festive feeling to the holiday, and it's truly a special memento.

photos.caption: Arlington Street Church (sunny but spectacularly cold day in Boston).
photos.captionKii: I was really captivated by the dramatic silhouette of this elegant church steeple, standing tall against what looked like a darkening sky. I loved how the black and white conversion emphasized all the intricate architectural details, from the multiple ornate levels to the tall, slender spire at the very top. You can really see the craftsmanship in the windows and the various decorative elements. It felt like a timeless piece of history reaching for the sky, and I wanted to capture its stately presence and careful design.

photos.caption: Patriots vs Broncos!
photos.captionKii: I was so excited to be at Gillette Stadium for a New England Patriots game! This shot captures a wide view of the field from my seat, with the players lined up for a play. You can see the distinct yard lines marked on the green turf, and the 'Patriots' star logo is clearly visible. The stands were absolutely packed with fans, creating an incredible atmosphere, though they're a bit blurred in the background. I loved taking in the full scope of the game, from the strategy on the field to the energy of the crowd all around me. It was a classic game day experience.

photos.caption: Fall in Austin (for a couple of days at least).

photos.caption: 77 degrees in the ATX today. And flowers still in full bloom. #WhyAustin
photos.captionKii: I took this close-up of some beautiful, vibrant red flowers with delicate, frilly petals, likely dianthus, blooming brightly in a garden. I love how the rich red color stands out vividly against the fresh green leaves. If you look closely, you can even spot a small insect, possibly a bee, diligently working on one of the blossoms, which I thought was a nice detail to capture. In the soft-focus background, there are hints of white flowers peeking through, adding a bit of contrast to the scene. It was a lovely little moment of nature that caught my eye.

photos.caption: Adirondack
photos.captionKii: I was completely captivated by the peaceful scene on this long, inviting porch. The sun, likely setting or rising, is casting this beautiful, warm golden glow across the wooden floor and chairs, making everything feel incredibly serene and cozy. I really loved how the light emphasized the wooden textures, from the ceiling above with its embedded lights to the individual floorboards. In the background, I can just make out some trees and hints of other structu

photos.caption: "My city of ruins"
photos.captionKii: I captured this striking view of the city skyline as dusk settled, or perhaps already in the early night. The buildings are brightly lit against the deep blue, almost purple sky, with their windows glowing and creating a beautiful contrast. I particularly noticed one building on the right with a distinctive pinkish-purple light at its very top, which added a unique touch to the urban landscape. The silhouettes of trees or foliage in the foreground anchor the shot, making the city lights stand out even more. It was a beautiful evening to appreciate the city's illuminated architecture.

photos.caption: The shape if this stump is pretty cool. #heartshapedbox
photos.captionKii: I found myself captivated by the intricate details of this tree stump, which I captured in black and white. From a top-down view, the patterns in the weathered wood look almost like swirling ram horns, with deep crevices revealing lighter-colored rocks or debris nestled within. Fallen oak leaves are scattered around and on the stump, some caught in the shadows, adding to the textured, natural feel of the scene. I really wanted to highlight the organic shapes and textures the light brought out.

photos.caption: So proud of my son @Ben_strout who scored his first goal this year (he normally plays D).

photos.caption: DSC03123 — SONY DSC

Next to them, my brown-haired boy (or nephew) is engrossed in something just out of frame, a gentle smile on his face. We were definitely enjoying some relaxed indoor time together, continuing the fun after our backyard gathering. It's a beautiful picture of family connection and the calm, happy moments we share.

photos.caption: DSC03102 — SONY DSC

I just love the sweet onesie with all the playful circus-themed illustrations in pink, green, and yellow, perfectly complementing the soft pink trim. It looks like the baby is being held gently, and I can just make out a burp cloth over the shoulder of the person holding them. This precious moment really encapsulates the warmth and joy of having the little ones around during our gathering.

photos.caption: DSC03097 — SONY DSC

He's got such a warm and reassuring smile, and the baby, with those captivating blue eyes and sweet expression, looks so comfortable and curious in his arms. I love that he's got a burp cloth draped over his shoulder, showing he's ready for anything. This moment perfectly captures the calm and loving atmosphere we shared during our indoor gathering, amidst all the outdoor fun we had that day. It's truly a precious memory of connection and care.

photos.caption: A pic from the other day of me with my beautiful niece.
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this sweet moment of a friend (or family member) holding a baby in what looks like a cozy backyard. My friend is smiling warmly at the camera, and the baby, dressed in a colorful patterned onesie, is looking right at me with such an innocent expression. The green grass of the yard and the wooden fence in the background give it a relaxed, homey feel, with a glimpse of a house and some budding trees adding to the spring atmosphere. It feels like such a genuine, happy moment, and I wanted to preserve this memory of them together.

It really stands out against the backdrop of the urban street, with buildings, a road, a crosswalk, and a clear blue sky on what looks like a beautiful sunny day. There's even a 'no right turn' sign visible further down the street, adding to the urban context. It's such an unexpected and cheerful piece of public art that adds so much cha

photos.caption: DSC03080 — SONY DSC

He's looking up with such a focused expression, totally absorbed in the action happening on the field. The stadium lights above are starting to glow brighter against the twilight sky, adding to that classic evening game atmosphere. You can see glimpses of other fans around us, some wearing orange, all sharing in the excitement. It's a great memory of being there and soaking in every moment.

photos.caption: DSC03077 — SONY DSC
photos.captionKii: I really enjoyed capturing this moment of a baseball player, number 13, from the Orioles, standing on the dirt diamond. They're in their black and orange uniform, with a raised arm, which makes me think they just made a great play or are acknowledging the crowd. The white bases and lines stand out against the rich red dirt of the field, and I can even see a glimpse of the opposing catcher in their blue uniform. This shot perfectly captures the dynamic energy of a game under the lights, and I wanted to remember this specific moment of action.

photos.caption: DSC03065 — SONY DSC
photos.captionKii: I really enjoyed capturing the impressive sight of these stadium lights blazing brightly against the deepening twilight sky. The multiple rows of powerful, circular lights stand out vividly, casting their glow and creating a strong contrast with the dark, silhouetted support structure. For me, this image evokes the atmosphere and energy of being at an evening event, whether it's a sports game or a concert, and I wanted to remember that feeling of anticipation and excitement that comes with the night being lit up.

photos.caption: Here w/ my folks, sister and bro-in-law at the Nat'l Cathedral.
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this shot of my family in front of the incredible Washington National Cathedral! It was such a beautiful, clear day with a bright blue sky, perfect for visiting such a grand landmark. My loved ones are all smiling and looking great against the backdrop of the stunning gothic architecture, with its tall spires and intricate rose window. I'm so glad we got to spend this time together exploring, and I wanted to make sure I captured this memory of them enjoying the impressive scale and beauty of the place.

photos.caption: Fence
photos.captionKii: I really liked the way the light played on this old wooden fence against the cloudy sky. Looking up from this low angle, the fence posts form a strong, rhythmic line, contrasting with the soft, wispy clouds scattered across the muted sky. There's a subtle vintage feel to the colors, which I think really enhances the texture of the weathered wood. It was just a quiet moment of noticing beauty in an everyday scene, and I wanted to capture that simple, striking composition.

photos.caption: Bucolic
photos.captionKii: I really enjoyed taking a moment to appreciate this beautiful, calm pond scene. The water looks so still, reflecting the sky and the lush green trees and reeds that line its edge. In the foreground, I love how the tall, golden-brown reeds stand out against the darker water, with some fresh green foliage peeking in from the left. There's a gentle slope of grassy land in the background, crowned with more trees, suggesting a peaceful, natural area. It was such a serene view, and I just wanted to capture the quiet beauty of this natural landscape.

photos.caption: My sweet girl in a field of wild flowers.
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this sweet moment of my daughter enjoying the outdoors! She's looking right up at me with such a bright smile, surrounded by a beautiful field of pink flowers. Her blonde hair is a little windswept, and she's wearing a striped tank top, perfectly comfortable for exploring. It was such a lovely day, and I'm so glad I got to capture her in this natural, joyful setting, soaking up the beauty of springtime.

photos.caption: Soccer practice.
photos.captionKii: I really enjoyed capturing this lively moment during a youth soccer game. Two young players in red and blue uniforms are intensely focused on the ball on a sunny, green field. The player on the left is mid-stride, seemingly about to kick, while the other player on the right is dribbling or moving towards the ball. In the background, I can see a few adults watching the game from behind a fence, adding to the typical game-day atmosphere. The sun is casting long shadows, suggesting it might be late afternoon, which often makes for great lighting.

photos.caption: Here's Miss @MelanieStrout blowing out her candles a day late.
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this sweet moment of her blowing out her birthday candles! She's leaning over the kitchen counter, concentrating as she makes her wish and extinguishes the flame on the '24' shaped candles on her cake. The cake looks delicious, and it's such a classic, heartwarming birthday scene. It was a really special celebration, and I'm glad I got to capture her in this happy, reflective moment in our kitchen.

photos.caption: Relaxed #nofilter
photos.captionKii: I loved catching this sweet moment of my daughter lounging on the bed. She's got that calm, relaxed look, lying back on the soft white bedding with her head slightly turned towards me, looking right at the camera. Her grey shirt with the sparkly design really stands out, and her hair is spread out around her. It's such a peaceful scene, and I just wanted to capture her in this quiet, reflective moment, looking so comfortable and at ease on her special day.

photos.caption: Ray of light.
photos.captionKii: I was really struck by the dramatic beauty of the sky this day. The clouds were dark and heavy, creating a moody atmosphere, but then this incredible, powerful ray of sunlight just burst through a gap, illuminating a path downwards. It felt almost ethereal, like a spotlight from above, making the moment feel incredibly grand. On the right, the dark silhouette of a tree framed the scene, adding to the contrast and highlighting the intensity of the light. It was a stunning moment of nature's power and beauty that I just had to capture.

photos.caption: A rare family shot in all our fanciness. #Easter
photos.captionKii: I absolutely love this capture of my family! Everyone is gathered together, all smiles and looking so cheerful. It's such a precious moment to have us all posing side-by-side, with the lush green foliage behind us creating a beautiful natural backdrop. My kids look so happy, and it’s wonderful to see all our faces lit up. Moments like these are truly special, and I’m glad I got to capture this lovely memory of us all together.

photos.caption: Beautiful flower.
photos.captionKii: I really loved capturing the exquisite beauty of this single, creamy white flower up close. Its delicate petals, perhaps a magnolia or a similar bloom, unfurled gracefully, revealing the soft, layered center. The shallow depth of field made the flower really pop against the dark, blurred background of branches and faint foliage, creating a serene and almost ethereal feel. It was such a peaceful moment to appreciate and photograph the intricate details of nature.

photos.caption: Holes
photos.captionKii: I was really fascinated by this unique architectural feature, a wall filled with circular cutouts that offered glimpses into the modern space beyond. Each opening was like a framed view, revealing parts of what looked like a large, open-plan building, maybe a museum or an art gallery. I could see people moving around, and the reflections and layers through the mesh made for a really intriguing perspective. The design felt very contemporary, with visible structures and bright, airy spaces, and I loved how these small windows created such an artistic way to observe the environment and the other

photos.caption: sleepy heads
photos.captionKii: I really enjoyed capturing these two majestic lions, completely at peace, napping soundly side-by-side on a large rocky outcrop. Their magnificent manes were so impressive, and they looked utterly relaxed with their eyes closed, soaking up the sun. The setting with the natural-looking rocks and sparse background foliage made it feel like I was getting a glimpse into their wild side, even though it was clearly within an enclosure, likely at a zoo. It was such a serene moment to witness.

photos.caption: Mu son channeling his inner Geronimo Stilton cc @melaniestrout
photos.captionKii: I loved seeing this fun mascot character, who looks so much like Arthur, at what seems to be a school or library event! The person inside the costume is wearing a green vest over a white shirt and a red tie, with those distinctive round glasses making the character instantly recognizable. They had their arms open wide, as if ready for a hug or to greet everyone. The background with rows of bookshelves filled with books and some colorful educational posters really confirmed the setting. It looked like a lively and engaging atmosphere, probably for kids, and it brought a smile to my face.

photos.caption: Snowy shack courtesy of my dad, @ronstrout
photos.captionKii: I was really struck by the peaceful beauty of this small, rustic shed, completely blanketed in a fresh layer of snow. Everything was covered in white, from the peaked roof to the ground, giving it such a serene, almost timeless look. The wooden shingles of the building still showed through a bit, adding a lovely texture to the scene, and I could see snow piled up on the windowsills. In the distance, a line of trees dusted with snow blended into the soft, overcast sky, making the whole landscape feel so quiet and untouched. It truly felt like stepping into a winter wonderland.

photos.caption: So proud of little girl. First time she's been able to do the rings. cc @melaniestrout
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this moment of a young girl having so much fun on the playground. She was really enjoying herself, hanging from the gymnastic rings with her legs outstretched, almost flying! Her vibrant, ruffled tutu skirt in shades of pink, orange, and yellow, paired with her bright red top and fuchsia flats, just radiated joy against the sunny backdrop. The playground's blue and yellow structure, along with the wood chip ground and the clear blue sky, made for such a classic and happy scene. It was a lovely day to be out at the park.

photos.caption: Angel of New York
photos.captionKii: I captured this iconic view of Grand Central Terminal, focusing on the incredible sculptural group atop the main facade. Even on an overcast day, the magnificent figures standing over the glowing clock face looked so dramatic against the cloudy sky. I loved how the clock was illuminated, giving it a warm, golden glow that really stood out. It's such a quintessential New York City landmark, and I was really struck by its grandeur and architectural detail.

photos.caption: Hamilton Pool
photos.captionKii: I was absolutely mesmerized by the stunning beauty of this natural grotto! Looking up, I could see the rough, textured underside of the cave's overhang, with ancient-looking stalactites dripping down, creating a dramatic frame for the view. Below, the water in the pool was such an incredible shade of deep green, and the sunlight reflecting off its surface created these brilliant, shimmering patterns. In the background, there was this massive rock face, topped with a scattering of trees, and I especially loved the pop of color from the reddish tree clinging to the cliffside. You can even spot t

photos.caption: Shower
photos.captionKii: I was really drawn to the design of this bathroom, especially the striking, multi-colored slate tiles covering both the walls and ceiling. The warm, rustic tones of rust, orange, and dark grey create such a unique, almost earthy, feel. I loved how the natural light from the large skylight, with its grid pattern, streamed in, creating these cool shadows and highlighting the texture of the tiles. You can also spot the showerhead and a recessed light on the ceiling, along with a bit of the glass block shower enclosure in the bottom left. It felt like a really thoughtfully designed space.

photos.caption: Red orbs. #clientlunch
photos.captionKii: I was really struck by the cool, modern ambiance of this restaurant or bar. I loved the red and orange spherical lights hanging down, which gave the whole place such a warm, inviting glow. They were suspended from dark, exposed ceilings that also featured some nice wooden beams. Below, there was this really interesting textured stone or brick wall, and prominently displayed on it was a large, abstract metal sculpture of a fish, adding a unique artistic touch to the decor. It felt like a really stylish spot.

photos.caption: I was here yesterday but liked this pic of Alcatraz
photos.captionKii: I got this classic shot of Alcatraz Island from the water, under what felt like a truly dramatic, moody sky. The famous prison buildings stand starkly on the island, and you can clearly see the old water tower on the left and a lighthouse on the right, both iconic features. The deep blue of the bay, with its choppy surface, really adds to the sense of isolation of 'The Rock.' It was incredible to see it up close, knowing all the history contained within those walls, and felt like another iconic part of my visit to the San Francisco Bay.

photos.caption: San Francisco this AM
photos.captionKii: I captured this stunning silhouette of the cityscape against a dramatic, cloudy sunset, or maybe sunrise, over the water. The golden light reflecting on the bay was absolutely beautiful. On the left, you can clearly see a lighthouse perched on a hill, and on the right, the iconic Transamerica Pyramid stands tall among the other buildings, making the San Francisco skyline instantly recognizable. It felt like a quintessential Bay Area moment, and I especially loved how the lone seagull posed perfectly on the wall in the foreground, adding to the serene yet striking scene.

photos.caption: With a fun crowd.
photos.captionKii: I was really struck by the impressive display of wine bottles in this large, built-in rack, which I captured in black and white to emphasize its texture and geometric design. Each section, divided into triangles, was neatly filled with bottles, creating a striking pattern. I think this was in a bar or restaurant because I can just make out a Bud Light can and another craft beer bottle, "Double ... Stout," on the counter to the left. The dark lighting and the sheer volume of wine made for a cool, atmospheric shot that felt worth remembering.

photos.caption: Pointy thing (and my last DC pic I promise).
photos.captionKii: I captured the Washington Monument from this interesting low angle, really emphasizing its immense height as it shoots up into the cloudy sky. The textured stone looks so grand against the overcast day, and I wanted to get that sense of scale and power. You can just barely make out a line of flags along the bottom edge, which adds to the monumental feel. It was another iconic sight on what felt like a day full of significant history and architecture.

photos.caption: 1600 Penn
photos.captionKii: I remember feeling a sense of awe standing before such an iconic landmark. This is, of course, the White House, framed beautifully by the bare trees of what looks like winter, and set against an overcast sky. I wanted to capture its stately presence, with the classical columns and the flag pole visible on the roof, standing as a powerful symbol. Even on a grey day, its grandeur and historical significance were truly palpable, and it felt important to document the moment.

photos.caption: Church and state
photos.captionKii: I was really drawn to the intricate details of this old architecture, especially captured in black and white. This photo highlights the distinct lines and textures of what looks like a church or a historic building, with its pointed slate roof capped by a beautiful cross reaching towards the sky. Beside it, another spire rises, adding to the dramatic silhouette against the overcast day. I loved how the monochrome treatment emphasized the patterns in the stonework and the overall somber, yet grand, feeling of these structures.

photos.caption: My country 'tis of the, sweet land if liberty..." [h/t @schneidermike]
photos.captionKii: I was really struck by the impressive scale and design of this building's interior. A massive American flag hangs proudly in the center, drawing your eye upwards. The entire structure is topped with this incredible glass and metal atrium roof, letting in so much light and creating a very open, grand feeling. I loved how the multiple levels of rooms or balconies were arranged around the central void, giving the whole place a very dramatic and patriotic atmosphere. It made me pause and appreciate the architecture and the powerful display.

photos.caption: My handsome boy dancing at catillion.
photos.captionKii: I really loved capturing this moment of two young people gracefully dancing, or perhaps just practicing, at what looks like a formal event. The girl is wearing a beautiful vibrant pink dress with dark purple tights, and the boy is quite dapper in his navy blazer, white shirt, and green tie, complete with a nametag. They're holding hands and positioned as if in a ballroom dance, surrounded by other people in similar attire in a grand hall. It feels like a very special occasion, maybe a cotillion or a formal school dance, and I found their focused expressions and elegant postures truly charming.

photos.caption: Sunset
photos.captionKii: I was completely mesmerized by this incredible sky, which just seemed to be on fire! The lower half is ablaze with vibrant reds and fiery oranges, contrasting dramatically with the darker, swirling clouds that dominate the upper sky. It was such a powerful and beautiful display of nature's artistry, like the horizon itself was glowing. I just had to capture this breathtaking moment; it's one of those skies that makes you stop and truly appreciate the world around you.

photos.caption: Moon over the Driskill
photos.captionKii: I was struck by the dramatic silhouette of this beautiful, ornate brick building against the twilight sky. The architecture is really something, with those lovely arched windows and detailed carvings, and there's even a small bust perched on the rooftop, adding to its grand character. I could just make out some text that looked like 'The Dixon' on the facade. What really caught my eye was the perfectly round moon hanging right above it, creating such a serene and atmospheric scene. It felt like a moment of quiet appreciation for the city's history and artistry as night fell, or perhaps as dawn

photos.caption: Stealing my own thunder.
photos.captionKii: I captured these striking bare tree branches, beautifully outlined by what looks like a delicate layer of frost or snow, against a clear winter sky. The way the light highlights the intricate patterns of the twigs is just gorgeous, creating such a stark and beautiful contrast in black and white. It really makes you appreciate the subtle beauty of nature during the colder months, even in what seems like a simple scene.

photos.caption: Now Mr. B showing off his skillz.
photos.captionKii: I caught this awesome shot of a young boy mid-air on the trampoline, clearly having a blast! He's wearing a bright red t-shirt and blue shorts, arms spread wide for balance or just pure joy, and his expression is a mix of concentration and excitement. The clear blue sky and a bit of greenery in the background confirm it was a beautiful day for outdoor play. You can also glimpse the corner of a house, which makes me think we were probably in our backyard or a friend's, just enjoying the sunshine and some good old-fashioned trampoline fun.

photos.caption: Miss A. high up in the air!
photos.captionKii: I caught this absolutely joyous moment of a young child mid-air on the trampoline, arms flung up in pure excitement! Her blonde hair is flying around, and her face is a blur of happiness, likely from laughter or a shout of delight as she's suspended. She's wearing a pink top, denim shorts, and grey leggings. You can just see my feet, or someone else's, at the very bottom, hinting that I was right there with her, perhaps bouncing along or cheering her on. The backdrop of green bushes, bare trees, and a clear blue sky suggests a beautiful, sunny day perfect for outdoor play.

photos.caption: "Hi. I'm a 'special' bunny."
photos.captionKii: I came across this incredibly fun and vibrant yellow rabbit statue with bright blue eyes and a wide-open, goofy smile, showing off its two prominent front teeth! The red details in its ears really pop. It definitely looks like something you'd find at a miniature golf course or some kind of amusement park, especially with the green turf and what seems to be a small castle structure peeking out in the background. The clear blue sky and bare trees indicate a cool but sunny day perfect for an outdoor adventure. This cheerful bunny just made me smile!

photos.caption: Lazy morning with my sweet daughter on my lap.
photos.captionKii: It looks like a casual day at home, and I caught my daughter on the couch, wearing her blue Chicago Cubs t-shirt. She's got that classic kid's slightly pouting or thoughtful expression, with her arms crossed. I also noticed some smudges or light scratches on her left wrist, which just adds to the authenticity of her being an active kid. You can just see a bit of other family members or friends around her, suggesting we were all relaxing together.

photos.caption: Bee kind
photos.captionKii: I captured this close-up of a really cute and quirky embroidered bee. It's so colorful with its bright yellow body, distinct blue stripes and head, and those fun, curling pink antennae and wings. It stands out vividly against the dark fabric background, which looks like it could be a piece of clothing, a bag, or some other textile item. I must have found this little detail charming enough to snap a photo of, perhaps during a moment of downtime or while exploring somewhere new.

photos.caption: Was blown away by some of the tricks @davidblaine was doing w/ @michaeldonnelly last night

photos.caption: So great to meet @dickc tonight. A gentleman and a scholar. Thanks for a great party! #ces

photos.caption: Boom!

The water danced and soared in perfectly synchronized patterns, illuminated by brilliant lights against the dark Las Vegas sky. I could make out the shimmering hotel buildings in the background, their lights adding to the city's vibrant glow. It's such an iconic part of the Las Vegas experience, and watching this grand show provided a wonderful sense of awe and a nice break from the busy conference floor.

photos.caption: Taking one for the team w/ @DamonKWayans

The background is a bit blurred, but I can make out other attendees and the general buzz of the conference. Seeing the #2013CES tag in the corner of my photo brings back memories of all the exciting tech and innovative ideas we were seeing there.

photos.caption: smoke
photos.captionKii: I looked up today and was struck by this abstract view of a building corner against a brilliant blue sky. The grey, textured facade of the building curves upwards, leading my eye to the top where a chimney emits a stream of white smoke or steam, which seems to take on the whimsical shape of a fish or some other creature against the vastness of the sky. Perched on a black arm to the left, a security camera points outwards, observing the surroundings. It's a simple, everyday detail, but the way the smoke caught the light and the crispness of the sky made me want to capture it.

photos.caption: Zuppa de pesche
photos.captionKii: I was completely captivated by this wonderfully elaborate ceiling decoration today, likely from one of the many unique venues in Las Vegas. It features several metallic, insect-like or mythical figures, with delicate wings and limbs, seemingly suspended in motion around a central light source that illuminates the entire piece. The design is so imaginative and detailed, adding a real sense of theatricality and grandeur to the space. It's exactl

photos.caption: Exposions
photos.captionKii: I ended my day with this absolutely mesmerizing view of the Bellagio Fountains, truly a highlight of my Las Vegas trip. The water danced and soared into the night sky, illuminated with a brilliant golden light against the dark backdrop of the city. I could clearly see the vibrant lights of the surrounding hotels, like the towering structure of the Paris Las Vegas with its glowing Eiffel Tower replica in the distance, adding to the spectacular ambiance. It was incredible to watch the synchronized performance, capturing the grandeur and magic of Vegas at night from what looks like an elevated vi

photos.caption: Roasted beet salad!
photos.captionKii: I captured this delicious-looking dish today, a vibrant beet salad that was truly a feast for the eyes as well as the palate. It's elegantly presented on a long white rectangular plate, featuring both deep red and bright yellow beets, artfully arranged. Each section is garnished with dollops of creamy white cheese, likely goat cheese or burrata, and fresh, peppery green arugula leaves. The lighting is subdued, giving the dish a sophisticated look, probably taken during an evening meal out. It was a wonderful culinary experience during my trip.

photos.caption: Oz
photos.captionKii: I woke up to this absolutely stunning view today, capturing the vibrant energy of Las Vegas from above. The iconic Eiffel Tower replica at the Paris Las Vegas hotel stands tall and proud, bathed in the soft morning light, with the detailed, circular patterns of the green gardens and fountains stretching out in front of it. In the background, I can see the sprawling city architecture and the beautiful, distant mountains under a dramatic sky. It was such a breathtaking panorama to start the day, really encapsulating the unique blend of grandeur and natural beauty here.

photos.caption: Donald Quixote
photos.captionKii: I spotted this really striking metal sculpture today, standing tall against the bright blue sky. It depicts a figure, like a knight or warrior, on horseback, holding what looks like a spear or lance. The style is quite abstract and rustic, with the metal having a reddish-brown and darker, almost purplish, oxidized look, giving it a very weathered and artistic feel. It's standing atop what appears to be a rocky base. The way it's silhouetted against the clear sky really makes it stand out – definitely a cool piece of art to stumble upon!

photos.caption: I love these girls so much.
photos.captionKii: This is such a sweet capture! I snapped this photo of two girls today in front of a light-colored wall with such a lovely message spray-painted on it: 'i love you so much' in pink script. The older girl, wearing a denim jacket over a patterned top, has her arm around the younger one, who's sporting a fun yellow Spongebob jacket – they both look so happy and wholesome. It’s a really touching scene, and I wanted to remember this moment and the beautiful sentiment.

photos.caption: DSC02399
photos.captionKii: I captured this interesting urban detail today in black and white. It's a slatted metal trash can, looking quite robust, with a black liner visible inside. The lid has a small, flat top, possibly an ash tray, and it stands next to what looks like the edge of a round, slatted outdoor table. The harsh sunlight creates really dramatic, long shadows on the ground, highlighting the textures and lines of these everyday objects. It really brings out the strong contrasts and geometric shapes in the scene.

photos.caption: DSC02395
photos.captionKii: I found this really cool manhole cover today, a true piece of urban history embedded right in the concrete. It's an aged, greenish-teal metal, covered in a beautiful patina that speaks of years of exposure. The design is intricate, with concentric circles and raised lettering that clearly spells out 'SAN ANTONIO, TEXAS' and 'SEWER', along with a prominent star in the center. There are a few dried leaves scattered around it, just adding to its weathered charm. It's these small, often overlooked details that really capture my eye in a city.

photos.caption: DSC02382
photos.captionKii: I captured this scene today, showing a large, white double-decker boat, which appears to be a tour or party vessel, floating peacefully on a body of water. I can just make out 'CAPITAL CRUISES' on its side. It's surrounded by tall, bare trees that line the banks, and in the distance, I can see rolling hills, hinting at a more natural landscape. The water has a gentle ripple, and the sepia tone really gives the whole image a serene, almost classic feel. It was a beautiful view of a calm moment on the water.

photos.caption: DSC02353
photos.captionKii: I spotted this really cool architectural detail today – a huge, pale yellow crescent moon mounted prominently on the dark blue wall of a building. The building itself has this neat, curved metallic roof, which adds to the modern feel. There's a small, rectangular window visible below the moon, and I like how the sharp white of the adjacent building contrasts with the deep blue. It was a breathtaking natural display, a perfect observation during our beautiful time here by the lake.

It was a beautiful, sunny day, perfect for splashing and relaxing by the lake.

The dense, green trees lining the distant shore provide a beautiful, natural backdrop to this exhilarating summer activity. What a blast it was!

photos.caption: Three generations post race cc @melaniestrout
photos.captionKii: What a way to celebrate the Fourth of July! Here I am, a little sweaty and perhaps a bit wet from the run, standing proudly with my son and his grandfather after finishing the 'Bridgton 4 on the Fourth' race. We're all wearing our race bibs – mine is 1801, my son's is 1195, and his grandfather's is 1803, with the 'Maine Running Company' logo visible. The smiles on our faces say it all; it was such a great feeling to complete it together, a true family effort and a wonderful memory from our summer holiday.

photos.caption: DSC01062

I love how alert and curious it looks, gazing intently off into the lush green background. It’s such a peaceful and serene moment, capturing one of those quiet, relaxed details during our wonderful summer getaway.

photos.caption: My youngest with her catch of the day

These are the sweet, simple moments I cherish most during our summer days by the water.

photos.caption: Roil

photos.caption: Fuego

I loved capturing this moment, feeling completely at ease and connected with nature.

photos.caption: Das Cabine

The waves were a deep, dark teal, almost black in places, with a vibrant strip of white foam crashing and churning against the shore. I loved how the water in the foreground created such intricate patterns of bubbles and whitecaps, contrasting with the smooth, rolling crests further out. It felt incredibly peaceful yet powerful, just watching them endlessly break and recede. Capturing this moment, I wanted to convey the immense scale and dynamic energy of the sea.

photos.caption: Riviera #notreally

I decided to process this one in a more subdued, almost sepia tone, which really emphasizes the structure and gives it a timeless, classic feel. It instantly brings back that sense of being at a fair or amusement park, which is always a special experience.

It was one of those moments where I just had to stop and appreciate the detailed artistry of nature.

The way they stretch upwards into the distance, almost like a field of modern scales, is so captivating. It's a simple shot, but it marks a moment of direction, a choice of path, and perhaps the beginning of an adventure heading eastward.

The contrast between the intense light and the deep, almost indigo sky around the cloud is absolutely captivating, giving the whole image such a powerful and moody feel. It felt like a truly grand display of nature's power, reflecting the changing weather I've been observing.

It perfectly encapsulates the somewhat brooding, yet beautiful, urban atmosphere I wanted to remember.

photos.caption: Looks like we're in for some weather!

Tall buildings frame the scene on both sides, their modern windows reflecting the muted light. I can also see the top of a leafy green tree and a street light pole poking up from below. It's a stark contrast to the bright sunshine we've had, and I wanted to capture the imposing beauty of this changing weather.

photos.caption: Myrtle Crepe

The scoreboard was lit up, adding to the vibrant atmosphere. It was a pe

photos.caption: Heirloom tomatoes from the garden!

There's a lovely mix of ripe red, sunny yellow, a large reddish-brown one, and even a green-yellow one that's still ripening. I noticed a few have those natural cracks that often indicate they're fresh from the vine, and several still have their green stems attached, which I love. They're all laid out on my speckled kitchen counter, looking absolutely perfect and ready to be turned into a delicious meal. It's so rewarding to see the fruits of a little gardening effort!

The air was filled with the delicious smell of fresh bread, and there were so many beautifully baked bagels, many covered in sesame seeds, ready to go. It felt like a really authentic experience, seeing the craft behind these delicious treats.

I spotted this really cool graphic design today. It's a simple yet very expressive black and white illustration of a character with a beanie and a mask, almost like a friendly, mischievous bandit or a playful burglar. The round eyes and the big smile give it such a charming and iconic look. I love how clean and bold the lines are, making it stand out. It just instantly caught my eye, and I thought it was a really clever and memorable design, so I had to snap a photo of it.

The intricate wooden frame and fabric wings really captured my imagination, making me think about the pioneers of flight. The building itself is quite impressive, with those massive windows stretching up and letting in so much light, and the brickwork adding a touch of classic design. It felt like walking through history while also appreciating modern architecture, and I just had to capture this blend of innovation and elegance.

It's such a captivating piece of design, transforming the entire atmosphere of the room with its soft, amber light. I just had to capture how magical and elegant it looked.

photos.caption: Upside building

You can even see a few people near the entrance, giving a sense of scale to this amazing architectural illusion. It truly feels like walking into a world of wonder and curiosity, especially at night when all the lights make it even more magical.

photos.captionKii: I remember walking along this beautiful covered walkway in the evening and being struck by the warm, inviting ambiance. The soft glow from the lights embedded in the ceiling cast a lovely, orange hue over everything, creating such a cozy atmosphere. I loved how the large, classic columns on the left added to the sense of grandeur, and you can see a row of empty tables and chairs waiting for guests. Looking down the path, I could just make out a couple of people enjoying their evening in the distance, with the twilight sky fading above the trees. It felt like a perfect, peaceful night out.

photos.caption: Lamb
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this iconic logo, the Golden Fleece from Brooks Brothers! It's a classic symbol, featuring a sheep suspended by a ribbon, and I thought it looked really cool on this textured dark blue background. I must have spotted it somewhere — perhaps on a storefront, a product, or an advertisement, and wanted to capture it as it always brings to mind a certain sense of tradition and quality.

photos.caption: Flashback to #aclfest @CaseMate #ACLcase
photos.captionKii: I remember looking out over this massive crowd at what must have been such an epic outdoor festival or concert! The energy was incredible, with so many people gathered, some standing, some chilling out on the grass. You can see the main stage off in the distance, bathed in light, with the city skyline towering behind it under a beautiful partly cloudy sky. There were even some cool flags scattered throughout the audience, adding to the festive vibe. It really captures the scale and excitement of being part of such a huge live event.

photos.caption: Johnny Wickersham of Social Distortion

You can even see some of the drum kit to the left. The energy was just palpable, and it felt amazing to be right there in the thick of the live music.

There's a hint of foliage from a tree at the bottom right, grounding the shot, but the main focus was definitely on those stunning sun rays breaking through the clouds. It felt like a really special moment to witness and capture.

The way the light caught the ridges and valleys, almost making them shimmer, was just mesmerizing. It was a moment of quiet observation, appreciating the natural artistry of the coast during our trip to Massachusetts.

photos.caption: A day at the beach
photos.captionKii: I remember this sweet moment on the beach, capturing these three kids enjoying the day. My oldest, wearing her black and pink swimsuit, had her arm around her brother. He was all smiles, looking ready for some fun in the water. And my youngest, in an adorable colorful floral suit, gave me the funniest little pout while holding her yellow toy. It was a classic beach day, with the soft sand and other families around, just soaking up the casual atmosphere during our time exploring the Massachusetts coast.

photos.caption: Digging
photos.captionKii: I remember another moment from our fun day at the beach in Massachusetts. Here, my son was fully engrossed, down on his hands and knees in the wet sand, really getting into digging or building something. My youngest daughter, in her cute floral swimsuit, was standing nearby in the shallow water, just taking it all in, while my oldest daughter, in her black and pink suit, was watching her brother play. It was a classic lively beach scene, with other families and umbrellas in the background, showing how much everyone was enjoying the warm, sunny day by the coast.

photos.caption: Mel, Joe and Alison
photos.captionKii: I remember this fun evening, capturing a great moment with my friends. We were all smiling brightly, and the man in the middle had his arms around the two women, making for a really warm and friendly group photo. It looks like we were out at a restaurant or a bar, given the dim lighting and the brick detail on the wall in the background. It was a lovely night spent catching up and enjoying each other's company.

photos.caption: Lily
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this stunning close-up of a vibrant red daylily, its petals a deep scarlet with a striking yellow and dark reddish-brown center. The prominent stamens with their anthers really stood out against the rich colors. In the background, slightly out of focus, were delicate clusters of small white daisy-like flowers, providing a lovely contrast to the bold red bloom. It was a beautiful moment of nature that I wanted to remember.

photos.caption: The kiddies
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this picture of a group of smiling kids and a young woman at the Red Sox game. They all looked so happy, and many of them were proudly wearing their Red Sox shirts, and one of the boys even had a Red Sox cap on. In the background, you can see the green walls of the stadium, just confirming we were right there, enjoying the day at the ballpark. It was great to see everyone having such a good time.

photos.caption: Run girls, run!
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this wide shot of the baseball field, showing more of the overall scene during what looked like a special event or activity. A wheelbarrow filled with equipment was sitting near the dugout, and further down the field, I could see a group of kids, along with a few adults, running across the vibrant green grass. The iconic red stadium seats stretched across the background, and the large 'Gulf' sign was clearly visible above, confirming we were definitely at the ballpark that day. It was cool to see the field being used in different ways beyond just the main game.

photos.caption: More running
photos.captionKii: I remember getting this wider shot of the field, really capturing the scale of the Green Monster with the prominent 'Gulf' and 'RED SOX SCHOLARS' signs displayed. It was great to see some kids out on the vibrant green grass, running and enjoying themselves, possibly during an intermission or a special event. There were adults supervising them, making for a really sweet and energetic moment amidst the big stadium atmosphere.

photos.caption: Speed demons
photos.captionKii: I remember watching this heartwarming scene unfold on the baseball field, perhaps during a special pre-game event or a community day. A group of children, all full of energy, were running around on the bright green grass, with several adults, possibly coaches or parents, guiding them. It was great to see them having so much fun on the actual playing field, with the iconic stadium stands and the huge 'Gulf' sign visible in the background, adding to the authentic ballpark atmosphere. It really captured another fun aspect of being at the game that day.

photos.caption: Oh say can you see...
photos.captionKii: I remember looking up from my seat at the baseball game and seeing this view: the American flag proudly waving against the perfectly clear, bright blue sky. To the left, one of the massive stadium light towers stood tall, and on the right, I could just make out part of the ballpark's upper deck or signage, adding to the iconic feel of the stadium. It was such a classic, patriotic sight at the game, really capturing the atmosphere of being there on a beautiful summer day.

photos.caption: Pedroia fielding
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this moment of a baseball player, wearing a white uniform with red sleeves and a cap, kneeling intently on the dirt of the field. He had his glove ready, seemingly anticipating the next play, with the vibrant green grass stretching out behind him under the bright sun. It was a perfect snapshot of a player focused during the game.

photos.caption: Ellsbury
photos.captionKii: I remember getting this close-up shot of the action on the field, capturing a Red Sox batter, number 2, in a powerful mid-swing. The catcher, in his grey and orange gear, was intently ready behind home plate, with the umpire right there too. I could see another Red Sox player on first base, and the stands in the background were absolutely packed with fans, many dressed in red, all focused on the game. It was a perfect moment to capture the intensity of the game from my seat.

photos.caption: Josh Reddick
photos.captionKii: I remember catching this moment during a baseball game, focusing on one of the players from the Red Sox. He's standing on the bright green field, wearing his white uniform, complete with the team cap and sunglasses, and holding his glove. The sun was really shining that day, highlighting the vibrant green of the grass and making the whole stadium feel alive. It captures a quiet, contemplative moment in the middle of a dynamic game, perhaps waiting for the next play to start.

photos.caption: Adam Jones & Big Papi (the shake)
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this cool moment on the field, where a Red Sox player in white was high-fiving or shaking hands with an opposing player from the Orioles, who was wearing a grey jersey with 'JONES 10' on the back. The sun was really bright, highlighting the vibrant green grass of the baseball field. It was great to see some of the action up close, a brief interaction between the teams during the game.

photos.caption: Alexandra and Adrian

The man was proudly wearing his blue 'RED SOX' t-shirt, clearly enjoying the day, and the girl, with her braces, had a lovely smile too. We were surrounded by the classic red stadium seats under the bright sun, soaking in the atmosphere of the ballpark.

photos.caption: Mel, Audrey and the monkey

The woman, with her sunglasses pushed up on her head, had a warm smile, and the little girl, with her blonde hair and a cute patterned dress, looked so happy with her pink stuffed animal draped around her neck. They were both smiling right at me, and in the background, I could see more of the red stadium seating and other fans enjoying the game. It was a lovely, candid moment captured during our day at the ballpark.

photos.caption: Green Monster (from left field)

The famous Green Monster wall dominates the left, covered with various sponsorships like 'SPORTS AUTHORITY', 'RED SOX FOUNDATION', 'COVIDIEN', and 'W.B. MASON'. You can also spot the tall stadium light tower reaching into the bright blue sky and part of the main scoreboard in the distance, which even has a 'WELCOME TO FENWAY PARK' sign visible. It truly captures the iconic architecture and atmosphere of being at a Red Sox game.

photos.caption: Catalda Tree #unfiltered

photos.caption: Dancing Kitties

The lush green trees and foliage in the background really made the dark cats and the subtle colors of the chimes stand out. It felt like such a sweet, whimsical touch to the natural outdoor setting during t

photos.captionKii: I remember being captivated by this stunning flower, which I believe is a Columbine, with its unique and beautiful design. The outer petals were a striking magenta or deep pink, while the inner, more delicate ones were a soft creamy white, all radiating from a vibrant yellow center with delicate stamens. Discovering such intricate beauty in nature was a wonderful part of that relaxed summer day, and I had to capture its elegance up close.

The sky was a muted gray-blue, and the water was so still that it perfectly mirrored the dark trees, creating such a peaceful and symmetrical scene. There's a simple wooden ladder attached to the side of the dock, inviting a dip or just a moment to sit and enjoy the quiet. It felt like such a serene and private moment, probably either early morning or late evening, truly capturing the tranquil beauty of that day by the lake.

photos.caption: Hills at twighlight
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this incredibly serene moment, looking out over the calm waters of what felt like a quiet lake at either dusk or dawn. The soft, pastel hues of the fading or rising light in the sky were beautifully reflected on the rippling surface, painting it with subtle pinks, blues, and grays. The dark silhouette of the forested hills in the background, with a faint tower just visible on the horizon, created such a peaceful contrast against the lighter sky. It was a perfect, tranquil scene that truly captured the quiet beauty of that summer day outdoors.

The black and white treatment really brings out the textures of the stone and the contrast between the dark trees and the bright, yet overcast, sky. It feels like a moment of quiet contemplation, appreciating the natural setting and the rustic architecture nestled within it.

photos.captionKii: I remember taking this shot, drawn by the raw textures of split firewood and the solid, worn metal of the axe head. It’s almost sculptural, with the axe wedged in there, showing the effort of splitting. It captures a different kind of natural texture and the practical side of working with wood, which ties into my ongoing appreciation for the tactile details found in nature.

photos.caption: More birch

It stands out against the soft, blurred background of the forest, and I loved how the light played across its unique surface, highlighting all those natural details I've been so focused on.
